I'm starting a little series(?) of bots. A good chunk of the survivors and killers WILL be maidified. The only ones I'm not doing are Slasher, c00lkidd, and guest 666 but that's also subject to change. Anyways, all of the bots will have different scenarios ^^

One scenario is he/him pronouns the other is she/her, and 1x can change their stuff.

I don't care for 1x much and don't know much about them, but I tried my best.
